title: Vault backend: empty KV secret returns {} instead of error
description: hashicorp-vault get() with no field query parameter calls serde_json::to_string on an empty HashMap, producing '{}'. This is returned as a valid SecretValue. Trigger: write a KV v2 secret with zero fields (empty metadata), then read it without a ?field= query param. Caller receives an empty JSON object disguised as a valid secret. Contract says unavailability is always a hard error but an empty value slips through silently.
